primaryUse: Systems thinking, engineering culture, agent orchestration, codebase scale, and contrarian synthesis.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public essays and licensed repositories as source anchors.
reusePolicy.codeReuse: MIT-licensed repositories can be reused according to their licenses. No-license public repos are inspect-only.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Use public captions or transcripts for summary with attribution only.

sources.title: Steve Yegge GitHub profile
sources.notes: Public code profile; inspect repository license before reuse.

sources.notes: Licensed public multi-agent workspace manager repository.

sources.title: Steve Yegge on Medium
sources.notes: Public/member writing surface; use only accessible public material.

gaps: Some personal GitHub repositories have no detected license; keep them inspect-only unless licenses are confirmed.
